h1: Best Hash Table Questions for Amazon
intro: A curated set of 19 Hash Table problems frequently useful for Amazon interview prep. Focus on patterns, not brute memorization.

faqs.question: How many Hash Table problems should I do for Amazon?
faqs.answer: Quality over quantity: master patterns with 15 well-understood problems, then expand.

faqs.question: Where should I start?
faqs.answer: Start Easy/Medium in this list, then tackle Hard variants. Pair with the Hash Table topic page and related roadmaps.
